title: Monmouth: 3 Horseshoes, John & Kay & Eben (Symonds Yat)

main_route.excerpt: We met John, Kay + Eben at the 3 Horseshoes. Lovely sunshine. Pub lunch. Simon road Eben a book on Quantum Mechanics. Back to their house for a cup of tea + chat.
Then home, via a pretty field with a view of Symonds Yat.
Then home, via a pretty field with a view of Symonds Yat.

boundary_flags: mixed_start: page B_0339 contains entries from multiple trips; the September 27th entry is this trip
mixed_end: same page contains an unrelated October 4th entry
summary: A single-day outing on 27 September 2020 from Birmingham to Monmouth, where Simon and Eve (with Tinder) met John, Kay and Eben at the 3 Horseshoes pub for a pub lunch and then visited John and Kay's house for tea. The return journey home passed via a field with a view of Symonds Yat.
extraction_notes: This is a domestic UK day trip with no overnight stay. The page (B_0339_L) contains several diary entries from different dates: 8 Sept (return to the farm), 12 Sept (return from farm), 27 Sept (this trip to Monmouth), and 4 Oct (moving furniture to the farm). Only the 27 Sept entry belongs to this trip. Peter is mentioned as taking furniture to London but this is a separate matter on the same page, not part of this trip. Tinder the dog is not explicitly mentioned in the 27 Sept entry but is a regular traveller; only Simon and Eve are named as going to John's on 27 Sept.
